query:
SELECT 
  planName,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
  AVG(monthlyCost) as avgCost
FROM services
WHERE planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY planName;
